quests.name: Back to Earth
quests.acceptMessage: To protect mortal world, Jade Emperor decreeds to choose 12 animals on earth to be Zodiac Envoys. Thus all creatures on earth are getting ready for a fight to became the chosen.Apollo descends to the world to find candidates. The road ahead is tortuous. You have to make great efforts to became one of the envoys. Please take the Zodiac Recommendation to find Blacksmith. Blacksmith is now at the entrance to the village.

steps.description: Bring Zodiac Recommendation Token to BlackSmith at the entrance to the village.

quests.name: Spinning
quests.acceptMessage: Blacksmith said that an ingenious weaving girl called Candy is in trouble recently. Go to find Candy and do her a favor.  Tip: Complete

steps.description: Kill dragonfly to get 10 "Dragonfly's Sting" and bring to"Candy"

quests.name: Magic Flask
quests.acceptMessage: The pet got from Grandpa has a ravenous appetite.Grandpa can not feed it to appetite. Pet may refuse to join the combat while its Health Points are low. I heared that a grocer came to our village recently, who has many treasured objects. It is said she has a Mob Flask, go to find it.   Tip: Complete

steps.description: Use "Experimental Mob Flask" to capture a "Dragonfly" and bring it to"Grocer"

quests.name: First Trial
quests.acceptMessage: The other day, Shopkeeper reserved a Brewing Bottle. P lease take the Brewing Bottle to Shopkeeper. Tip: Complete

quests.name: Jeff the Door God
quests.acceptMessage: Door God Jeff parades the town every day to ensure security of citizens. It is a hard job. Please do his duty today to let him have a rest. And you happened meet Roaming Soul this day. Tip: only appears at night.            and  Choose one
quests.completionMessage: Jeff the Door God is complete.

quests.name: Kavin the Door God
quests.acceptMessage: Door God  parades the town every day to ensure security of citizens. It is a hard job. Please do his duty today to let him have a rest. And you happened meet  this day.  Tip only appears at night            and  One option only.
quests.completionMessage: Kavin the Door God is complete.

steps.description: Kill "Roaming Soul"at night in Cloud City : 159.284

quests.name: Disenchanting
quests.acceptMessage: Orchid Temple is at the north of Cloud City. There are no monks living there now.  The temple is said to be haunted by ghost. A young man called Franklin came back from there the other day. It seems he is possessed by evil spirits. Please pay a visit to him.

steps.description: At your 14 level, go to speak with "Franklin". Quest reward: None
Encounter a ghost called Bonnie. Bonnie gives you a jewelry to bring to Franklin.

quests.name: Magical Adventure
quests.acceptMessage: After getting back to consciousness, Franklin told you his love story in Orchid Temple. He met Bonnie in the temple. He is just a mortal who has no magic power. He can not save Ahriman-possessed Bonnie. But he hopes that there are someone who can help him to save his beloved in Orchid Temple.   Tip: Complete  Soul of Bonnie will appear at night.

steps.description: Locate Bonnie at Orchid Temple at night. Quest reward: None Quest Description: After getting back to consciousness, Franklin told you his love story in Orchid Temple. He met Bonnie in the temple. He is just a mortal who has no magic power. He can not save Ahriman-possessed Bonnie. But he hopes that there are someone who can help him to save his beloved in Orchid Temple. Tip: Complete "Task 7" ¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡Soul of Bonnie will appear at night. ¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡ <204000><0>Previous ¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡ <200001><0>Back

quests.name: Hell Gate
quests.acceptMessage: Hell is a place full of danger. Maple Valley Spirit gave you his rod and told you that he and Black and White Azrael are good friends. Bring this rod to them, they will guide you to hell.  Tip: Complete

quests.name: The Fog
quests.acceptMessage: Tree sprites in Willow Forest are attacking passers-by which make the forest a dangerous place trapped in evil mist. Although Jade Emperor had given Maple Valley Spirit Capitulater's Command, he can not defeat those monsters. He was flushed out from his land and decades of years passed. Maple Valley Spirit told you the story a hundred years ago and give you Jade Emperor's Demon Subduing Rune. Go to Underworld to find the protagonist in the story.  Tip: Complete

quests.name: Catcher Azrael
quests.acceptMessage: Black Azrael's job is to capture wild sprites in day time. Do him a favor to capture sprite for him, so that he can have a rest and he will be please to take you to Enterance of Hell.  Tip: Complete

steps.description: Capture 2 Wild Sprite by Mob Flask for Black Azrael

quests.name: The Forbidden Hell
quests.acceptMessage: Soul Judge drew the Death List and told you that the protagonist of the story is now being punished in hell. Normal guy is not able to get into it. You need to prove your worth in the fight.  Tip: Complete

quests.name: Giant Willow
quests.acceptMessage: Maple Valley Spirit saw Rune of Seal and he's very glad. If evil mist pervades the forest,they have to live a hard life under evil's oppression. He is eager to kill those monsters.   Tip: Complete

quests.name: Giant Peach
quests.acceptMessage: Giant Willow has fleed. Evil mist in front Willow Forest has lifted. But deep inside the forest, a thick mist is still pervading. It occasions Maple Valley Spirit great anxiety for the monsters inside must be more vicious. Maple Valley Spirit advices: "Never be bewitched by monster's word."  Tip: Complete

quests.name: Old Friend
quests.acceptMessage: You met Geralyn in the thick forest. She's being attacked by a spider sprite. What is Geralyn doing here? Now kill the brute and save her.  Tip: Complete

steps.description: Tell Flap-eared Pig that Geralyn has returned safely.

quests.name: Evil Spider
quests.acceptMessage: Since Flap-eared Pig left Goal Manor, Spider Goblins in Cobweb Woods began to cast a greedy eye on Goal Manor. Every year there are villagers being attacked and lose lives by these monsters. Now during the eve of Doomsday, monsters are becoming more and more rebellious. Now Flap-eared Pig is still with, go to kill those spiders with him please.   Tip: Complete

quests.name: Thief Catcher
quests.acceptMessage: A piece of news from   says recently Darkness Caterans in  became active again. They may have some conspiracy. Please take Commander's  token to  in . He may need you help.

quests.name: Everyboies Wish
quests.acceptMessage: News about Crane Pass Crush is widely spread and Darkness Caterans get flustered. Lord Glenn dispatchs a general to safeguard Swan Pass. Swan Pass in front of you is the the final defence of Darkness Cult.   Tip: Complete

quests.name: Poisoned Rain
quests.acceptMessage: During worship ceremony to Rain God  in Chill Pass, poisonous rain falls. Many grass roots lie down and get sick which make General Lee confused. You take the Royal Sword with you and go to Dew Peak in the South to find God of Rain who may know more about the poisonous rain.  Tip: Complete

steps.description: Take General Lee's  to God of Rain
Speak with Mussel Fairy's Sister at Blurred Lake to get information of Rain Summoner. Then kill  Rain Summoner to get  to God of Rain

quests.name: World Disaster
quests.acceptMessage: Mussel Fairy was finally defeated and awakened. For her sister's plead, Mussel Fairy 's not killed. The dinner celebratory dinner ends, but not the disaster in Chill Pass.  #2<8><219000><0>Previous #2<8><200001><0>Back"

steps.description: At your 38 Level, go to speak with

quests.name: Illness Beadroll
quests.acceptMessage: At last, a complete Disease Tome is found. This is a book lost for hundreds of years which records all disease remedy in human world.  Smith felt very sorry. I want to be a doctor when I was a kid...... Bring the book to Fiend of Plague, so as to help the sick in mortal world.

steps.description: Kill "Hoe Ghost" to obtain "Broken Tome 1" .Then take it to Smith
Bring "Royal Sword" and "Elixir by Fiend of Plague" to General Lee

quests.name: Birth of Nalory
quests.acceptMessage: Superme Taoist predicts that Nalory's rebirth 's coming and he will be General Lee's son. Superme Taoist has took him as a disciple and now wants to present him a .

quests.name: Secret Passport
quests.acceptMessage: Chill Pass is a place dogged with misfortunes and mishaps currently. Border Patrols safeguard border access strictly. When they saw General Lee's passport,they permit your leaving. Working in border is very hard. Letters are used to connect the beloved in hometown.

quests.name: Cosmos Spook
quests.acceptMessage: The continuous rain brings depressed grey days to the whole Cloud City. Much-experienced Jeff feels that Cosmos Spook will arrive here tonight and will treat the matter seriously.  You should get prepared for the coming tough fight!  Tip: Complete             only appears at night.

quests.name: Lingering Fantom
quests.acceptMessage: The cloud and darkness arouse the depression. Lingering Fantom's coming shocks the ghosts. Kavin is completely ready for the fight. Tip: Complete             only appears at night.

quests.name: The Comeback
quests.acceptMessage: Being liberated from Lord of Ahriman's control, Soul of Bonnie shows her long lost smile. Soul of Bonnie tells you her tragic story. Soul of Bonnie recalled that she has a  personal belonging at some place of Orchid Temple. Please help Soul of Bonnie to find it.  Tip: Complete

steps.description: Ar you 18 level, go to speak with "Commander" Quest reward: Experience: 2000 Gold: 400 Coin: 800 Item: "Bonnie's Pendant" Quest Description: After getting back to consciousness, Franklin told you his love story in Orchid Temple. He met Bonnie in the temple. He is just a mortal who has no magic power. He can not save Ahriman-possessed Bonnie. But he hopes that there are someone who can help him to save his beloved in Orchid Temple. Tip: Complete "Task 7" ¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡Soul of Bonnie will appear at night. ¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡ <204000><0>Previous ¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡ <200001><0>Back

quests.name: Crane Pass Victory
quests.acceptMessage: A cluster of bandits is indeed troublesome, but not a problem. After saveral combats, the stupid bitches wants to go and get help. Follow the bandit to see is there really somebody in Darkess Cult.  Tip: Complete

quests.name: Goal Manor Immortal
quests.acceptMessage: After the Darkness Cult disturbances are put down, Cloud City restore peace again. Commander recalled your apprenticeship. Currently you have defeated Lord Glenn, and you must have learned a lot skills from Commander. Commander heared that a legendary hero lives in Goal Manor. Although he has a pig face, he is of powerful magic. Pay a visit to him now.    Tip: Complete

steps.description: At your 20 level, travel to "Map 131" to speak with "Flap-eared Pig"

quests.name: Bad News
quests.acceptMessage: When people are cheering for perishing Evil Spider, another bad news comes which let them down.Woodman met a dying soldier on his way home.Woodman droped his woods and carry the soldier to Goal Manor.Go to ask Badly-wounded Soldier for details.  Tip: Complete (2)

steps.description: Bring Badly-wounded Soldier's "Monster Information" to Flap-eared Pig
At your 24 Level, go to speak with Maple Valley Spirit

quests.name: Perfection
quests.acceptMessage: Giant Willow and Giant Peach are successfully sealed. To avoid being unsealed by mistake, the Rune shall be kept in a safe place. In Chill Pass, there is a reliable man-- General Lee. Take the Rune and go to find him.  Tip: Complete

steps.description: At your 32 level, bring "Rune" to "General Lee"

quests.name: Demon Party
quests.acceptMessage: When  sees your , she became quite nervous. The 2 sisters used to work hard in cultivating themselves to elves. She never thought that her sister was possessed by devil and began to breach the world.   hopes that you can spare her life.

steps.description: At your 35 level, go to speak with "General Lee" in Chill Pass

quests.name: Lake Secret
quests.acceptMessage: Fiend of Plague's pill is potent. Sick citizens are recovering. Why does Chill Pass become a land of disasters recently? Zodiac Eudemon once said that the land near Doom Stone will be effected by the Doomday calamity.

steps.description: At your 38 level, go to speak with
Go to locate Superme Taoist in Sunlight Hole to find answer of the mysterious lake

quests.name: Lonely Ghost King
quests.acceptMessage: The Cosmos Spook scares Jeff and Kevin, but the Ghost King will tremble both of them. Ghost King is a powerful monster that countless ghosts gather in one and will not come down to the human world easily. It, however, is the time of turmoil. Everything is in the air since the Doomsday is around the corner. The new Gate Keepers have to ask someone tough for help. Tip: Complete             only appears at night.

steps.description: Kill "Lonely Ghost King" in Cloud City

quests.name: Wild Ghost King
quests.acceptMessage: The  scares Jeff and Kevin, but the Ghost King will tremble both of them. Ghost King is a powerful monster that countless ghosts gather in one and will not come down to the human world easily. It, however, is the time of turmoil. Everything is in the air since the Doomsday is around the corner. The new Gate Keepers have to ask someone tough for help. Tip: Complete             only appears at night.

steps.description: Kill "Wild Ghost King" at Cloudy City:196.466

quests.name: Doomsday
quests.acceptMessage: Rebel of Doom Demons has undermined the mortal world. Please find the entrance of Lake Abysm as soon as possible to save the world.Go to kill Illusion of Alien Queen Siren now. Tip: Complete

quests.name: Mentor's Care
quests.acceptMessage: Superme Taoist has encrolled a girl apprentice who has been sent to help Zodiacs to fight against the evil.You will met her one day.  Superme Taoist hopes that you can bring this letter to her.

quests.name: Mysterious Woman
quests.acceptMessage: The place that  will conquer is a tower jail imprisoned lots of monsters and sprites. Lots of heavenly generals are safeguarding the jail. No one can get access to it. But there's an object on earth called Knockout Incense which may put anyone into sleep. You shall find the materials to make the incense.

quests.name: De-evil Tower
quests.acceptMessage: The very person Judy wants to save is prisoned inside the tower. Her name's Mrs. White. Heavenly generals and soldiers are on patrol, so you 2 shall split up on the mission.If you find Mrs. White in the tower, please bring Snake Hairpin to her. She will leave with you.   Tip: Complete  #2<8><230000><0>Previous #2<8><200001><0>Back"

quests.name: Longicorn Adventure
quests.acceptMessage: Before the match, Longicorn King played a mean trick. He took a mirror out and shake it in front of foe. His foe will be dazed and lose sense. When waking up, they are imprisoned into Longicorn Jail. Contest for marriage is going on and the finals is coming. If they can not enter the final, you will lose. Try best to get out,please! Longicorn King's mirror is very powerful. Take care. There shall be some object can resist such mirror....

quests.name: Haunted House
quests.acceptMessage: A ghost rumor spread in this town. Door of the family beside the government building is closed at day. But at night, it will open and passers-by often hear people crying inside the house. Citizens only know that their baby died when it was born. Go to check on it.  Tip: Complete  #2<8><230000><0>Previous #2<8><200001><0>Back"

quests.name: Silence Hell
quests.acceptMessage: It will be not so easy to find memery of Dementor. If you are not somebody, Night Owl will not cooperate you.   Tip: Complete  #2<8><234000><0>Back #2<8><200001><0>Previous"

steps.description: At your 68 level, go to speak with

quests.name: Pet
quests.acceptMessage: It is time to introduce you to Scholar. Scholar is an honorable man in our village. He will introduce local food to you which is very delicious.

quests.name: Dementor
quests.acceptMessage: What God of Kitchen worried happened. Evil Cat underestimates the enemy. Dementor is not so easy to be captured. If Dragon-Fire Shell is mis-used, Dementor may be shock into original shape, and it happened......God of Kitchen's brows are wrinkled.So it must be very serious.

steps.description: Take "Soul Absorber's Memory" to find "Evil Cat"

quests.name: Fight for Love
quests.acceptMessage: Team A 1st Race. Your foe is Evil Longicorn.Ready? Go! Tip: Team A  and  Team B Select one only  Team A is 1V1 mode combat. You can get ticket from  or

quests.name: Fight for Love
quests.acceptMessage: Your foe is Longicorn Fighter Ready? Go! Tip: Team Aand Team B  Select one only Team B is 3V3 mode combat. You can get ticket from

quests.name: Fight for Love
quests.acceptMessage: Team C 1st Race. Your foe is Captain of Lion. Ready? Go! Tip: Team C is melee combat. You can get ticket from Game Mall.

quests.name: Ghost Hunting
quests.acceptMessage:
God of Kitchen is sent by Jade Emperor to mortal world to arrest 3 ghouls fleed from Hell. The child being hustled away last night is one of the 3 ghouls --  Soul Absorber. Among the 3 ghouls, Soul Absorber is the weakest one. It is not difficult to defeat him, but it's not easy to tempt him out. Soul Absorber has learned Underground Flee Skill and I believe you have gone through his power. To tempt Soul Absorber out, you need to find his memery in hell. For capture of Soul Absorber, Soul Judge will not give you a hard time.
  Tip: Complete  #2<8><230000><0>Previous #2<8><200001><0>Back"

quests.name: Headless Ripper
quests.acceptMessage: After sucessfully sealing Soul Absorberyou bring Soul of Dementor back successfully. But God of Kitchen doesn't seem quite happy. Anyway, bring Soul of Dementor back to Soul Judge as soon as possible.   Tip: Complete  #2<8><230000><0>Previous #2<8><200001><0>Back"

steps.description: Bring "Soul of Soul Absorber" to"Night Owl"

quests.name: Farewell to Jessica
quests.acceptMessage: Havn't waken up from the daze in hell, noisy morning in Timber City has come. Headless Ripper's words is still rang in your ears. Governor told you that Jessica has gone and left a letter. Is she being taken away again by Longicorn King again?

steps.description: At your 70 Level, go to speak with "Governor" Quest Description:With the help of Zodiac Eudemon, you have successfully run out of the gate. But from Night Owl and Soul Judge's face told you that something unexpected happened. Go to check on Jessica at the Governor's. She may need your help. ¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡ <210000><0>Previous ¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡ <200001><0>Back

quests.name: Punishment
quests.acceptMessage: Moon Lake Spirit show warm  hospitality to you. Then he told you that several years ago, Lakery suddenly disappeared. From then on, the Moon Lake is swallowing by desert day by day. According to servant boy of Lakery, Lakery left his home after receiving a letter and never returned. Cepheus in Thorn Mountain does evil everyday. The servant boy believes that he may be a suspect.

steps.description: Bring "Village Head"'s "Stone of Remorse" to "Lake Spirit"

quests.name: Anxious Thunder God
quests.acceptMessage: What worried Thunder God is Lotus Godness's son--Jerry. It is an event in heaven which in not his business. But Jerry is Thunder God's disciple and Jerry wants to save his imprisoned mother in Heaven Prison. Now jerry has gone to fight against Alphonso who is a powerful heaven warrior. As Jerry's teacher and a God, Thunder God fell into a dilemma. He can not fight against heaven, but he doesn't want his disciple killed by  Alphonso. Oh, what can he do?

steps.description: At your 82 level, go to Lotus Peak to speak with "Thunder God"

quests.name: Underground Hall
quests.acceptMessage: The compass gave a direction of Underground Hall. The owner of underground hall must be somebody due to his capture of Lakery. Currently the most important thing is to find Lakery. Lakery's servant said that when the lake ran dry, Lakery will disappear as god of the lake. Take your time now.

quests.name: Skull Goblin
quests.acceptMessage: Soul-free Valley is on the north of Moon Lake. It is said that skeleton solders wonderred in that horrible land and it became a nest of monsters. Lakery in Moon Lake hasn't seen human-beings from Soul-free Valley for a long time.

steps.description: At your 86 level, travel to "Map 161" to speak with "Grandpa"

quests.name: Adversary
quests.acceptMessage: Hell is really a cursed land. At last, Nowt is defeated.But Jessica wanted to throw away the Sealing Rune. Is she stupid or something?  Tip: Complete

quests.name: Leaving Longicorns
quests.acceptMessage: Longicorn King's contest for marriage has been ruined by you. He will pay you off for your insult! Now  Longicorn King has not recovered his sense, take Jessica to run out of Longicorn State, please. When Longicorn King wakes up and want to find Jessica back, it will be very hard to fight against so many Longicorn soldiers.

quests.name: Giant Icicles
quests.acceptMessage: According to Melody, they are already far away. Currently you are surrounding by sleeping Frozen Goblins .Take care not to awaken them or these vicious monsters may tear you into pieces. You are not frightened by Melody's suggestion, aren't you?

quests.name: Apprenticeship
quests.acceptMessage: Commander is a general leading armies who is strong and skillful. You are bound to learn a lot from him. But recently lots of bandits are making trounles outside Cloud City. Citizens are interrupted. Thus Commander is busy dealing with those robbers. He introduced you to a master. You can find the master near Pothouse.  Tip:

quests.name: Knowing your ways around
quests.acceptMessage: It seems M/A Manager has nothing to teach you now. When he saw your pet, he remembered that there is a Pet Curer in the city. He thought you may need to learn some pet knowledge. Go to pay a visit to the pet curer.  Tip :Complete
quests.completionMessage: Knowing your ways around is complete.

steps.description: Bring "Letter of M/A Manager" to "Pet Curer"
Travel to East Gate to speak with "Corey"
Pay a visit to "Franklin" at south of the town

quests.name: Geralyn
quests.acceptMessage:
It is out of everyone's imagination that Geralyn which you saved in Maple Valley is a illution of Spider Sprite. The real Geralyn may be put into prison by Evil Spider. Evil Spider may premeditate to attack Goal Manor. To avoid alerting the enemy, Flap-eared Pig will continue to play 
 Geralyn's role in Goal Manor. And it is your duty to liberate  Geralyn from Evil Spider.  Tip: Complete  #2<8><211000><0>Previous #2<8><200001><0>Back"

steps.description: Escort "Geralyn" to Goal Manor to meet "Flap-eared Pig"
Bring Flap-eared Pig's Rubble to find out spider sprite in human skin in the manor

quests.name: Flaming Hell
quests.acceptMessage: Peter is being punished in Flaming Hell. In order to discharge from prison, he tells you the story. He said he will never forget the horrible scenes that year that 2 tree monsters appeared. He was playing ball and a strange wind blew the ball onto a tree. In order to get the ball back, he climbed the tree, but he unseal the Sealing Rune by mistake. He ran away and bery the rune underground in Cobweb Woods.  Tip: Complete

steps.description: Bring "Rune of Seal" to Maple Valley Spirit

quests.name: State of Longicorn
quests.acceptMessage: After escaping from the De-evil Tower, Mrs. White and Judy plan to flee faraway to somewhere unknown to  get rid of the Heavenly Soldiers. It is said that the city is often harassed by the monsters from north. Recently, Judy saw county official sent numerous tribute forward north. It must cost an arm and a leg.

steps.description: At your 55 Level, travel to  to speak with

quests.name: Unexpected War
quests.acceptMessage: The prince of Celestial State, Norman tells about the whole story from the marriage proposal to the outbreak of the war between their countries. There are so many unexpected things happening in these months. At this despairing point, God of Venus is down from Heaven and helps him out. Now, God of Venus and the arms of Nalen State come to deadlock at frontline, West County Pass.

steps.description: At your 90 level, go to speak with "Norman"

quests.name: West Pass War
quests.acceptMessage: The fairies from heaven should not get their hands on the human war only if it is concerned  with... When it makes sense to me that it is about the Doomsday the monsters outside West County Pass attack again. With the instruction of God of Venus, defeat them with Nalory. They are tough guys that common soldiers can't beat.

quests.name: North Pass War
quests.acceptMessage: It's time to recover the lost North County Pass for the diminishing of attacks from Nalen State. But Malory's fight at front line doesn't go smoothly. The two giant beasts guarding at the gate of North County Pass scare lots of soldiers to death. One is in charge of thunder, another is in charge of lightning. Go and help soldiers subdue them.

steps.description: At your 92 level, go to speak with "God of Venus"

quests.name: Cheering Duo
quests.acceptMessage: Defeated East Cheerleader will escape to West Cheerleader for help. And West guy mustn't sit by while the east is lost. Disguise into a bandit and sneak into the west gate to defeat the West Cheerleader. Tips: Speak to Nalory, you can disguise into a bandit.

steps.description: At your 94 level, go to speak with "Nalory"

quests.name: Hell Pass Adventure
quests.acceptMessage: Your immediate concern is getting back your soul to insure you not to become a wandering soul. Your lost soul will be captured to Hell by Evilelf for judgment. Once the judgment is completed, it's unlikely to get it back. Monkey King took his soul back from Soul Judge. It's much better in case that you can save you soul out when the soul is on his way to hell. You have no chance to get your soul back if Hades hold it. Triumph Path is the only way to Hell. The entrance of the Hell is on the land there.

quests.name: The Mission
quests.acceptMessage: "Now have you got it? Dark power will take the chance of Doomsday to riot and rebel. Jade Emperor select zodiac envoys to resist the calamity. If you get lost, you may not be the chosen. " Jasmin says continuously, "As time going by, dark power are recovering. You are far from powerful. Go to find Mike, who may make you a better man! "

quests.name: The Power
quests.acceptMessage: You are not powerful enough to contend against Demons of Doom. Maybe Mike's right. But no one would like to admit weakness. To prove yourself, you continued to accept Mike's quests.      Carp Sprite lives in Benthal Path, who is voicious and ambicious. Now at the time of Ecliptic calamity, Carp Sprite begins to stir. Go to find Simois in Chill Pass for information of Carp Sprite.

quests.name: The Eudemon
quests.acceptMessage: Since Jade Emperor's Zodiact Selection, the omen of Doomsday was spread among folks. Doom Demons'  resurrection by power of Doom Stone  is inevitable. At that time, there will be a holy war between sky and earth. All immortals who experienced holy war will never forget its bloodiness. Now the man in front of you stops talking and ask you to do what he told you to.

quests.name: The Omen
quests.acceptMessage: Zodiac Eudemon is waiting at the appointed time; You will start your journey at Orchid Temple. Lots of Ahrimans gathered here who are more horrible than wonderring ghosts. And behind those Ahriman,there is an invisible hand controlling all the evils. All of these may related to Doomsday. This may be what worried Jade Emperor. But that is what your mission is, isn't it? Go and fight for justice!

steps.description: At your 16 level, go to "Map 163" to speak with "Zodiac Eudemon"

quests.name: Another Possibility
quests.acceptMessage: Power will bring both hope and ambition. Sprites cultivated themselves for thousands of years to became elves. During this period, the  corrupted ones may do evils on earth. Now doomday's coming. By power of Doom Stone, sprites can absorb boundless energy to became elves. That 's the beginning of sprite turmoil. Hope to see you in Mapple Valley.

quests.name: Force of Zodiac
quests.acceptMessage: Compared with previous bandits, more vicious monsters are waiting for you on the way ahead. Evil spiders in Cobweb Woods and tree monsters in Willow Forest are all bloody suckers. Zodiac Eudemon's help is very limited, but in the end he said:" I shall have buried it there. It will be quite helpful to you."

steps.description: Take "Zodiac Eudemon's Memory" with you to find out "Force of Zodiac" and bring it to "Zodiac Eudemon"

quests.name: True Power
quests.acceptMessage: Maybe Force of Zodiac will never recover to its original state. But it can be part of your power. Seeing the sleeping Force of Zodiac, Eudemon is thinking how to arouse it. Firstly, carp blood is needed. Carp Sprite lives in Benthal Path, who is voicious and ambicious. Now at the time of Doomsday, Carp Sprite begins to stir. Go to find Simois in Chill Pass for information of Carp Sprite.

steps.description: At your 30 level, bring "Zodiac Rod" to "Zodiac Eudemon" in "Map 111"

quests.name: Stele in the Lake
quests.acceptMessage: Demon of Doom had been guarding the Doom Stone faithfully for a long time. The Doom Stone would active periodically, which was called the Doomsday. Jade Emperor has attempted to destroy the Stone for several times, But the Demon of Doom defeated him and the beasts and devils who approach the Stone became the slaves of the Demon. You will have the same result if you get close to it. The amour is prepared for you.

quests.name: The Signal
quests.acceptMessage: \"I am the chosen Zodiac Eudemon.\" a shadow-like guy tells the story again, \"I will guide you to finish the task and not to follow the old road although now you are too weak to do it. I'll wait you at Orchid Temple, your starting point.\" Then the guy vanishes in the air. I am thinking about the Orchid Temple and decide to get some information in Cloud City.

quests.name: The Threat
quests.acceptMessage: Jade Emperor is afraid of Doomsday, so are Gods in heaven.All experienced Gods will never forget what a catastrophe is.Lots of Gods will die in the war. But power of Gods is limited and every God has his personal purpose. Now go to prove your worth!

quests.name: The Right Path
quests.acceptMessage: Zodiac Eudemon felt relief that you didn't go astray. The Doom Stone is in the lakebed of this place. Each Demon of Doom guards one Stele. It is the Twelve Demon of Doom who will not leave the Stone easily. There are a lot of people try to get close to the Doom Stone. That is the story. Then have a break.

quests.name: Dragonfly Catching
quests.acceptMessage: The boy is over-noisy and unreasonable. He is always begging towards strangers and doesnt let them go if they give nothing. Get the dragonfly for the boy.

quests.name: Behind the Curtain
quests.acceptMessage: Little Boar can speak!!And he even has an piggy army! He is showing off in front of you. It seem they are powerful! Go to beat these boars!!

quests.name: Passing the Love
quests.acceptMessage: After expressing his gratitude, Farmer gives you a wisp of fennel grass and ask you to send it to Maria. The wisp is the symbol of safety.  Tip: Complete

quests.name: Hungry Wolves
quests.acceptMessage: Grandpa said he hasn't seen his good friend farmer for long. He was worrying about him.~~ Tip: Complete #2<8><202000><0> Last Page #2<8><200001><0>Back"

steps.description: Defeat "Hungry Wolf" and then console the terrified "Farmer"

quests.name: The Lost Child
quests.acceptMessage: Naughty Idler who lives in Cloud City chases after a beetle. In the end, he loses his way.

quests.name: Pork Soup
quests.acceptMessage: The piggy's days are numbered. Samuel finally decides to butcher it and make it into soup for his sick mother. As to the useless Piggy Circle, get it back to Jasmin.  Tip: Complete    #2<8><204000><0>Previous #2<8><200001><0>Back"

quests.name: Fake It to Make It
quests.acceptMessage: He called himself an immortal cultivating himself in montain. He told you will get injured at his first sight to you. Will it happen?  Tip: Zombie will appear at night
quests.completionMessage: Fake It to Make It is complete.

quests.name: The Baby Wolf
quests.acceptMessage: Never will parents hurt their babies. Even the fierce Injured Wolf will take care of its baby gently. It looks like helpless and hopeless when hearing the its baby crying for food because he has no strength to search food for them both.  Tip: Complete

steps.description: Gather some "Boar Meat" for the baby wolves.
steps.completionDescription: Return to "Injured Wolf" with enough "Boar Meat"

quests.name: A Plague Errand
quests.acceptMessage: Pub Owner's Famous Painting was stolen the other day. At last, the detectives arrested the thief and took Famous Painting back to Pub Owner.

quests.name: Declaring war against Caterans
quests.acceptMessage: Recently bandits outside the city are making troubles. Commander is worrying about security of the city. Go to kill these bastards  Tip:  and Select only one
quests.completionMessage: Declaring war against Caterans is complete.

quests.name: Fighting against Bandits
quests.acceptMessage: Recently bandits outside the city are making troubles. Commander is worrying about security of the city. Go to kill these bastards~ Tip:  and Select only one

quests.name: Ringleader of Cateran
quests.acceptMessage: Commander recived a secret letter saying that a group of Caterans are plotting terrorism attack at the city. Go to kill their head and these barstards will dissolve.  Tip: Complete

quests.name: Ringleader of Bandit
quests.acceptMessage: Commander recived a secret letter saying that a group of Caterans are plotting terrorism attack at the city. Go to kill their head and these barstards will dissolve.  Tip: Complete

quests.name: Evil Giant Bear
quests.acceptMessage: Giant Bear monsters are wandering around in Darkness Mountain. Darkness Caterans are taming these bears to be their mounts. Commander want you to do him a favor.

quests.name: Battle between Beetles
quests.acceptMessage: A group of children are playing Beetles.Ryan is very short can can not rush headlong into the crowd. He is upset and is about to weep.

quests.name: Rare Material
quests.acceptMessage: Feather of Lizard is very precious. A full lizard feather is very expensive. Armor Dealer is looking for these materials.

quests.name: Blacksmith's Food
quests.acceptMessage: Mrs. Lee is an old grandma. She fell down today and go to give her a hand, please.  Tip: Complete  #2<8><204000><0>Previous #2<8><200001><0>Back"

steps.description: By the way, bring "Blacksmith's Dish" to "Blacksmith"

quests.name: Separation
quests.acceptMessage: The jail-escaping event attracts all the citizens' attention and rises discussion. Only Gladys pays heed to Wine Gourd. It is marked Favor of  food.  Gladys has a urgent demand for the gourd.  Tip: Complete

quests.name: Catcher White Azrael
quests.acceptMessage: To everyone's surprise, the arrogant White Azrael turned you for help. He is complaining that there are endless wild ghosts and he is tired. Darkness power is growing stronger now.

quests.name: Green Worm
quests.acceptMessage: Jasmin-a  plain lady but of remarkable disposition. She is different from others in both behavior and speech. But she is quite afraid of Green Sworm which makes her an ordinary girl

quests.name: Beggar's Secret
quests.acceptMessage: When talking about Beggar, Jasmin flet sorry. Why is she taking care of a beggar and why does a plain lady present an expensive silk coat to a beggar? Maybe you could go to speak with Jasmin to find the answer out.

quests.name: Fairy's First Thing
quests.acceptMessage: Godness in heaven came down to earth by the change of Jade Emperor's Zodiac Envoy Election to feel the life among human-beings. It is said there are 4 seasons and true love in mortal world. Can the Godness change the world? This day, Godness turned her attention to Samuel's mother. This grandma's pitiful. Bring this Piggy Circle to Samuel. It may remove Soul of Pig 's curse on her.  Tip: Complete

quests.name: Fairy's 2nd Thing
quests.acceptMessage: The second quest. Detective Lee in the city acts in a queer way in normal days. Godness reveals that he's an illusion of spider sprite!  Tip: Complete Detective Lee will appear at night

steps.description: Kill monster who disguised as "Detective Lee"-Cloud City(134.111)

quests.name: Evil Rogue
quests.acceptMessage: Looter often rob the passersby, especially the senior and the young. What can he get from them? He is so abhorrent.

quests.name: Lazy Soldier
quests.acceptMessage: The soldiers are sleeping under the tree and it's no wander these bandits are so rampant. You should give these soldiers a lesson and let them snap out of it. Tip: Complete

quests.name: Coward
quests.acceptMessage: We should not rely on these coward-like soldiers to perish the bandits. Tip: Complete

quests.name: Escort
quests.acceptMessage: All the bandits are arrested besides their leader Outcast. He is not easy to get his knees down to the ground and should be imprisoned in the Government Agency for several hundred years. Tip: Complete

quests.name: Prison Breaker
quests.acceptMessage: Bandits came to break the prison to save their fellow at night. They are now escorting Outcast to flee. Guards are catching up. Don' t let him escape. Tip: Complete

quests.name: Prodigal Son
quests.acceptMessage: At last, Gladys and Outcast met each other again. Outcast confessed other bandit spots. End of Bandit is coming. Outcast also wanted the 2 Jades. Tip :Complete

quests.name: Leverage
quests.acceptMessage: This coward confessed all. Escort him to Commander in Cloud City now.  Tip: Complete

quests.name: The Conspiracy
quests.acceptMessage: Outcast receives the information of confidential conspiracy and following was a threaten letter. He is required to wait the masked assassin to head for Darkness Mountain. If he does not show up on time, his families will be in danger. So he decides to go there alone for the sake of his families' lives.  Tip: Complete

quests.name: Gourd with Blood
quests.acceptMessage: Covered with Outcasts blood all around, Bloody Gourd glistens and catches all the escaping bandits into it. And then Outcast reveals the conspiracy and then dies. The bandits in Bloody Gourd proves that.  Tip: Complete Quest

quests.name: Mother's Illness
quests.acceptMessage: Samuel's mother is sick. No doctor in the city can heal her. A wizard called Shane told him that evil spirit possessed his mother. Lonely Soul's Pollen is needed to cure his mother.  Tip: Complete

quests.name: Blessing Purse
quests.acceptMessage: At last Samuel accept Shane's idea and soon his mother died. Samuel's mother became Soul of Heaven. Soul of Heaven doesn't want to leave. She wants to save her son and get rid of pig soul.  Tip: Complete Soul of Heaven will appear at night.

quests.name: Recovery
quests.acceptMessage: Samuel didn't have the heart to kill the sow he had fed. It was very ill and its days were numbered. You can ask Pet Curer whose medical skill is famous in the city for help.  Tip: Complete

steps.description: Help to gather 5 "Worm Spine" and 5 "Memorial Fragment"

quests.name: Farmer's Gift
quests.acceptMessage:
Mr. Parr made a Sweep Net  especially for his grandson Jose who interested  in catching insects.
Jose must be playing near the village. Hand Sweep Net to him please.

quests.name: Proof
quests.acceptMessage: In, One day a purple hungry leopard jumped out when he was on the way to chop wood. Even though it got injured on its left leg, the leopard attempted to prey him for food. Suddenly a girl appeared and was brave enough to save both their lives. So  always bears gratitude in his heart.

quests.name: Unexpected Help
quests.acceptMessage: There are lots of ghost and wolves on this land. Now the smart girl in the morning and a wolf sprite are being surrounded by a group of ghost.  Tip: Complete

quests.name: Zodiac Order
quests.acceptMessage: There is a sharp contrast of Broadsword Warrior's fierce appearance and his bold character. The charming difference leaves a good impression for others. And people are attracted to help him unconsciously. These wolves are trapped by Soul of Injustice. Please help them for Broadsword Warrior ~  Tip: Complete

quests.name: Cobweb
quests.acceptMessage: Although the spiders in Cobweb Woods are a threat to Goal Manor, many merchants run risks sending people to Cobweb Woods and to collect the cobweb of high quality. Lots of people lose their lives for it.

quests.name: Beautiful Shell
quests.acceptMessage: The crabs living in the sea bottom like to gather a kind of gorgeous shells. They put the shells on the beach. How I wish to have a look of the beautiful shells.

quests.name: Fierce Tortoise
quests.acceptMessage: It is bewildered that a group of barbed tortoises walk along seaside. They seriously hurt the fishermen. Those dangerous tortoises need to be driven away.

quests.name: Good Luck
quests.acceptMessage: Forsighter thinks that he is the maestro of Fortune Telling. And he claims that he will tell fortune for free if he can't speak right to the truth. Test your luck in the casino with Fortune Rune Forsighter sent.

steps.description: Take Fortune Rune with you and speak to Ralph.

quests.name: Achelous's Tortoise
quests.acceptMessage: Achelous's Golden Tortoise has been stolen. At last you find the thief goblin out but he has sold it to a cunning merchant.

quests.name: Bad Lucks
quests.acceptMessage: People in Chill Pass now have faith in superstition for their lives. The sacrifices they carry onto the hill seduce many eagles. There is a super big one that carries citizens onto the mountain off among them. It scares people in the city. Please kill Glede on the top of mountain for them

quests.name: Dray
quests.acceptMessage: The goods carriage of merchant broke on the road. The horse wriggled itself free and please help the merchant to escort these goods to Marcus at wharf of Chill Pass.

quests.name: Weird Medicine
quests.acceptMessage: There is a cannibal monster in stone shape on the way to the mountain. He kills herbal-picking people with the lure of uncommon herbals. Help Cute Boy to kill this monster with the help of Cute Boy

quests.name: Training
quests.acceptMessage: The hard and endless journey of Zodiac requires high qualification. You should face the lures of beast and should have the willpower that supports you to never give up by halfway.Go to kill a group of monsters on Dew Peak.

quests.name: Trumpet Shell
quests.acceptMessage: Poor Princess of Dragon is locked in the room because she lost his father's moonstone. It is certain that she hasn't a good time in the room and she likes to collect Trumpet Shell . Please get some Trumpet Shell  for her.

quests.name: Carp King's Sin
quests.acceptMessage: These Carp Kings are making troubles. Now they are unruly for the Dragon Princess is not in. Go to kill these goblins.

quests.name: Copper
quests.acceptMessage: Lots of prisoners in Flaming Hell want to get out of here. Thus Copper is qute busy in arresting the wanted prison breaker. Nowt has ordered that none ghost is allowered to get out!

quests.name: Past Sins
quests.acceptMessage: I deserved it. I do evils when I was alive and now I was punished in the hell. It's late for me to regret. If you can leave here, please tell my grandson to help those poor people!

steps.description: Bring "Will of Greedy Ghost" to his grandson

quests.name: Quest 426
quests.acceptMessage: Blue Hoe is just an Excecutor and how dare he conspire with a gang of bandits. Now transmit my order to Green Hoe. I want him to  suppress Blue Hoe.

quests.name: Builup of Evil Troop
quests.acceptMessage:
Green Hoe takes a deep breath after selecting a token
It might be his wishful thinking. To supress the rebel bandits, he needs a strong army. Go to find some solders for green hoe, please.
quests.completionMessage: Builup of Evil Troop is complete.

quests.name: Piggy's Comeback
quests.acceptMessage: Warming up is over! Lets move to the next challenge. Catch and fight against one of the leaders in Piggy Group, Piggy Leader. The one who get it first is winner.

quests.name: Piggy Leader
quests.acceptMessage: Warming up is over! Lets move to the next challenge. Catch and fight against one of the leaders in Piggy Group, Piggy Leader. The one who get it first is winner. Tip: Complete

quests.name: The Rumor
quests.acceptMessage: These monsters hear that matches can give their power. So they are interested in the matches carried by Jessica. Although bamboo tube is back, she still keeps crying. It's really confusing! Oh, her foot hurts. Kind as you are, send her back to Timber Town.

steps.description: Kill "Little Leopard" and bring "Bamboo Tube" to "Laura"

quests.name: The Giant Petal
quests.acceptMessage: What Johnson desperately need is Maneating Flower's petal, Large Petal. Large Petal can be found on the grown-up Maneating Flower. Get some for her.

quests.name: The Difficulty
quests.acceptMessage: is a well-known pious girl in the Timber Town. She and her mother live a poor life. She finds nowhere to buy medicines for her mother although she holds the money which is the value of the matches gotten back from monsters. According to , it's too dangerous for a girl like her to bring back the medicines.  doesn't eat anything to object her girl to take risks. Tip: Complete

quests.name: The Suffering
quests.acceptMessage: It's not easy to be a great Johnson. Jessica came to the store for the medicines and left with a broken heart. Because the completeness of the medicines needs Purple Block. Purple Block is used for cooking the medicines. Without Purple Block, the medicines will not work at all. Tip: Complete

quests.name: Plague of Locusts
quests.acceptMessage: Locust on the Regret Cliff are not for confession but doing evils. People met them are scared. It's time to teach them a lesson.

quests.name: Evil Dragon
quests.acceptMessage: Ethan and her husband live a happy life. Recently, something weird happens. She gives birth to a baby that bears half shake appearance and half human appearance. Old Shaikh flies into rage. Ethan and her husband want to have a talk with Old Shaikh and hope to please him. However, it's not easy to get close to Old Shaikh. First defeat the Clan Guard guarding gates.

steps.description: Kill "Clan Guard" , you will see "Old Shaikh"

quests.name: The Dragon's Growth
quests.acceptMessage: Ethan misses her baby so much. Whatever it is her own baby, but she can't disobey Old Shaikh. She asks you to visit her baby for her and give Parcel filled with food which is cooked by her own hands to her baby.

quests.name: Lonely Heart
quests.acceptMessage: Little White Dragon has changed a lot for a few days. He can't live without water and has no friends. You come up with an idea that you catch a Iron Crab to accompany him. Tip: Complete  Select one only

quests.name: Blood Is Thicker
quests.acceptMessage: Seeing dragon scale on her baby, Ethan feels happy very much. Her baby has never been a monster, it is a dragon who can bring bless to all the human beings. She cries with joy. Ethan feels that she must do something for her little dragon. It's said that Fragile Wings of Longicorn Soldier have some magical effects. Pick some for Little White Dragon. Tip: Complete

quests.name: Cruel Choice
quests.acceptMessage: Seeing the dragon scale, Old Shaikh shows his true color. He has some evil plans in stomach. So he decides to send you to fight with Blue Dragon and take Dragon Bone to prove that the evil dragon is diminished by him. Tip: Complete #2<8><238000><0>Previous #2<8><200001><0>Previous"

steps.description: Kill "White Dragon" to obtain "Dragon Bone" and submit it to "Old Shaikh"

quests.name: Sudden Attack
quests.acceptMessage: Captor Leo knows what happens about these pets after reading the letter. It must be concerned with these monsters in the De-evil Tower. Go and stop them for further actions.

steps.description: Bring "Pet Feeder"'s "Letter of Perplexity" to "Captor Leo"

quests.name: Stubbornness
quests.acceptMessage: All Longicorn Soldiers in the Longicorn Hole are tough guys. You cannot stop him from getting Beetle Horn for Joseph's well-known stubbornness. For his safety, you decide to get it for him.

steps.description: Kill "Beatle Soldier" to get 10 "Beetle Horn" . Then submit it to "Joseph"

quests.name: Frustration
quests.acceptMessage: Palm often gets upset recently and feels like being out of control. What's the problem? He thinks that it has begun from the moment he saw Heart Demon in De-evil Tower. Could it be that...? Check it on for Palm.

steps.description: Kill 15 "Heart Demon" to find truth out and then go to check "Palm"

quests.name: Flying Little Mouse
quests.acceptMessage: Maybe Alexander has been lonely for so long or citizens in Longicorn State are crazy about Little Bat. Alexander was so high that he once had a glance of Little Bat. According to his words, Little Bat is not a bat but a flying mouse. He asks you to get a Little Bat for him. There is nothing you can do about that.

quests.name: Saving the Doll
quests.acceptMessage: No matter what happened, Old Witch Doctor thinks the childlike innocence are always in Child Corpse's heart. Can we call it Everlasting Innocence? So Old Witch Doctor resolves to help the doll. First remove the evil spirits on him.

steps.description: Kill 15 "Child Corpse" and then locate "Old Witch Doctor"

quests.name: Breaking His Words
quests.acceptMessage: Sprites and goblins are all liers! Go to find proof of their lies and then speak with Longicorn King.

steps.description: Kill "One-eyed Beast" to get 10 "Yellow Clay" and submit to "Longicorn King"

quests.name: Richard
quests.acceptMessage: Richard disliked these damn leaves who stole and damaged his treasue when he is in a sleep. Richard sworn to take revenge on them!

quests.name: Quest 467
quests.acceptMessage: Trick Sprite came again! That demn buster! Citizens of Longicorn State dislike the sprite for his destructive insects always damage the corp. He lives at Lotus Peak. Go to beat him!

steps.description: Bring "Indictment" to "Elfin" so as to expose his plot
Kill "Trick Sprite" and give him a lesson

quests.name: Oil Story
quests.acceptMessage: Ryan became unhappy because his mother ask him to buy some oil. Thus he can not play games with his friends. Please buy the oil for him to make him happy. And there are some tips for buying oils. Go to ask shop Waiter.

steps.description: Locate "Waiter" to get Oil Bottle and bring it to "Grocer Merchant" . Then take "Purchased Oil" to "Ryan"

quests.name: Flaming Tree
quests.acceptMessage: This Flaming Tree absorbed the spirit of the sun and became the love symble between James and Beauty. Although they both live in hell, the distance between them is long. They can not meet each other. The Flaming Tree is sick because it sees the pain between these two lovers and worries about them.

steps.description: Take "Flaming Leaf" to speak with "Beauty" for answer of Flaming tree's sickness

quests.name: Quest 470
quests.acceptMessage: Drought is not terrible. The terrible are those Jackals. Nicholas told you that those Jackals often came to steal water. Go to beat them!

quests.name: Sandworm
quests.acceptMessage: This smart Grocer ask you to capture some Sandworms in Great Desert. Do her a favor!

quests.name: The Rock
quests.acceptMessage: The beautiful Ever-spring Garden became nest of Rock Monsters. Villagers are afraid of being attacked. Please do them a favor.

quests.name: Make A Fire
quests.acceptMessage: It is hard to earn a living nowadays. How can a little girl fight against powerful Flame soldiers? Go to do her a favor, please!

quests.name: For Justice
quests.acceptMessage: Gu-Gu was attacked by Scorpion in the desert yesterday. Leif is both worried and angry. Those busters shall be beaten!

steps.description: Kill 10 "Scorpion" and tell "Leif" this good news

quests.name: Quest 475
quests.acceptMessage: In the Manor lived an Immortal called Adrian who receded flood and saved farmland for villagers. Tyler asks you to bring Adrian his gift to reward this immortal.

quests.name: Violator Gany
quests.acceptMessage: Jane's quite funny. This immortal kept on saying that how evil Aciculas are and asked you to beat those goblins. Do Jane a favor, please.  Tip: Complete

quests.name: Quest 478
quests.acceptMessage: Fake Immortal is active.

quests.name: The Reason
quests.acceptMessage: The Reason is active.

quests.name: Quest 480
quests.acceptMessage: Club Spirit is active.

quests.name: Quest 481
quests.acceptMessage: Jeff worried that Gamba may get hurt. He asks you to do him a favor to help Gamba and kill the Vulture!!

quests.name: Quest 482
quests.acceptMessage: Happy Family is active.

quests.name: The Fence
quests.acceptMessage: The spring in the Manor is clear and sweet. Villagers enjoy the water very much. Wade is a good young man who wants to make a fence to surround the spring so as to avoid the pollutions. But he's lack of banboo. It is said that Huge Rocks have the hobby of collecting Twig bamboo!

quests.name: Quest 484
quests.acceptMessage: Sudden Impulse is active.

quests.name: Quest 485
quests.acceptMessage: The Beauty is active.

quests.name: Quest 486
quests.acceptMessage: In order to thank you, Ava decided to realize one dream for you. Before your speaking, the smart girl got what your are thinking. Please bring this letter to Rane. She will speak to you.

quests.name: Saffron And Julia
quests.acceptMessage: Saffron And Julia is active.

quests.name: Quest 488
quests.acceptMessage: Peach wood Timber is active.

quests.name: Going the Wrong Way
quests.acceptMessage: Going the Wrong Way is active.
quests.completionMessage: Going the Wrong Way is complete.

quests.name: Mountain Spirit's Story
quests.acceptMessage: Mountain Spirit is an old man who likes to tell stories. He has a lot of story books. Elaine and Bob from Celestial State always come to read the books. But beasts and wild animals also come to hear his story. Elaine and Bob may be eaten. It is said Mountain Spirit wants a Claybeast. No one knows why.  Tip: and  Single selection

quests.name: Elaine's Reading
quests.acceptMessage: Bob tells you that he decides to stay after you finished the task. What a cunning guy! Maybe your performance exceeded his expectation. Go and tell this to Elaine.

quests.name: Kind Elaine
quests.acceptMessage: Bob's refusal reminds warm-hearted Elaine. She thinks for a while and decides not to find the treasures and return the book to Mountain Spirit. You should pay the price if you borrow something from someone else. Go and bring some lizard meat to Mountain Spirit. Tip: Complete

steps.description: Travel to  to kill  and collect 10  to

quests.name: Bob's Reading
quests.acceptMessage: Bob's Reading is active.

quests.name: The Curse
quests.acceptMessage: The evil Bob has defeated Mountain Spirit, but his dream did not come true. Instead, to his surprise, his eye gets blind. He's been punished and you also made a mistake. Find medicine to cure Bob. It is said there's kind of Nectar on Ghost Fire which can heal blindness. Go to collect some.

steps.description: Travel to "..macro_GetMapName().." to collect 10 "Ghost Fire" 's "Nectar" and then bring them to "Bob" for healing his blindness

quests.name: Soul Flower
quests.acceptMessage: Danny is a very kind and diligent woman who lives alone. As she is getting older, she becomes more keen on growing flowers. She grows a lot of plants inside and outside her garden. It's said that there is an enchanted flower which is telepathic. Danny wishes she could plant this kind of flower.

quests.name: Demon Flower
quests.acceptMessage: Demon Flower escaped and makes report to their king--Ghost Grass. The king orders to arrest and kill Eric. Eric is worried and gets sick. Please go to negotiate with Ghost Grass. But before saying anyting, he inflicts attack on you! Tip: Complete

quests.name: Examination Result
quests.acceptMessage: Examination Result is active.

quests.name: Ghost Fairy
quests.acceptMessage: The road ahead will be full of thorns. It is said heart flower is a treasure. You shall travel to Soul-free Valley to locate Ghost Fairy. But Ghost Fairy only appears at night.   Tip: Complete  #2<8><248000><0>Previous #2<8><200001><0>Back"

quests.name: Fairy and Phoenix
quests.acceptMessage: After getting Ice Crystal, you have to give another two things to Ghost Goddess: Antelope Grass and Thorny Pill. You can ask Hans and Steve for these two things in Celestial State. Tip: Complete

quests.name: Mysterious Kid
quests.acceptMessage: All is ready. Ghost Goddess told you that with this in your sack, you would meet godness.  Tip: Complete

quests.name: Ugly Heart
quests.acceptMessage: Ugly Heart is active.

quests.name: Quest 503
quests.acceptMessage: Caught in the Cross Fire is active.
quests.completionMessage: Caught in the Cross Fire is complete.

quests.name: Sandy
quests.acceptMessage: Sandy is a beautiful and smart girl. She stayed in her mother's tummy for 9999 years. It's said that on the day she was born, there were lots of auspicious stars appearing in the sky. Jason was told by Jade Emperor to give a well-decorated clothes to Sandy. Please go and give it to her.

quests.name: Bad Temper
quests.acceptMessage: Sandy has a sister called Tina. She is very cranky and pisses about everything. Tina became angry when she heard that her parents decided to send her to the west and get married. Go and comfort Tina. Tip: Complete #2<8><249000><0>Previous #2<8><200001><0>Back"

steps.description: Kill "Evil Fork" and get "Fang Ring" .Then bring it to "Tina"

quests.name: Pepperbox
quests.acceptMessage: Sandy has a sister called Tina. She is very cranky and pisses about everything. Tina became angry when she heard that her parents decided to send her to the west and get married. Go and comfort Tina. Tip: Complete #2<8><249000><0>Previous #2<8><200001><0>Back"

steps.description: Kill "Evil Reamer" and obtain "Glinting Hat" . Then submit it to "Linda"

quests.name: Crush
quests.acceptMessage: Two sisters are all married. Sandy actually has a prince charming in her mind and he is Norman in Celestial State. Since the last time she came to Celestial State, Sandy totally fell in love with Norman. She asks you to tell this to Norman. Tip: Complete  #2<8><249000><0>Previous #2<8><200001><0>Back"

steps.description: Travel to "Map 152" to defeat "Soul Envoy" and get "Icicle Lock" .Then bring it to "Sandy"

quests.name: Quest 509
quests.acceptMessage: Trap is active.

quests.name: The Longest Song
quests.acceptMessage: The Longest Song is active.

quests.name: Quest 511
quests.acceptMessage: The Most Diabolic Thing is active.
quests.completionMessage: The Most Diabolic Thing is complete.
